response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates exceptional software engineering craftsmanship and 20 years of development experience, he lacks the core technical requirements for this role. His C++ experience is limited to a 6-month engagement in 2014–2015 at National Instruments, and his career has consistently moved away from systems programming toward web, cloud, and TypeScript-based development. There is no evidence of industrial automation domain knowledge, embedded systems experience, multi-threaded networking applications, or familiarity with industrial cybersecurity standards (SDL, IEC 62443) and protocols (MQTT, Modbus TCP/IP, OPC UA). For a mid-senior role requiring 8–12 years of C++ expertise, the gap is too significant.
strengths: 20+ years of continuous software development with proven ability to master diverse technology stacks and mentor teams
Strong architectural and design thinking demonstrated across full-stack roles, including event-driven systems at Dunnhumby
Excellent software engineering practices (TDD, CI/CD, clean code) and open-source contributions with community impact
concerns: C++ expertise is minimal and outdated—last substantial experience was 6 months in 2014–2015; primary focus has been JavaScript/TypeScript for the past decade
No industrial automation, embedded systems, or IoT development background; entire career has been in web, SaaS, and distributed-systems domains
No demonstrated knowledge of industrial cybersecurity standards (SDL, IEC 62443), networking protocols (MQTT, Modbus TCP/IP, IEC 61850, OPC UA), or multi-threaded systems programming
